title: YUNG's Endergized End Island (EE x YBEI)
description: Compatibility patch for YUNG's Better End Island and Endergetic Expansion
body: Aims to restore the features of YUNG's Better End Island replaced by Endergetic Expansion (Gateways) ~~and optionally End's Phantasm (Obsidian Platform)~~, while also integrating Endergetic Expansion blocks into the structures, making the whole place aurafarm with purple fire 😎
